title: Spain vs Argentina: One Team Played. The Other Endured.
snippet: I have watched enough football to know that finals are usually tense affairs.

title: Love Didn't Die. We Priced It Out.
snippet: The Nigerian dating scene has become one of the most expensive places to look for something that is supposed to be free.

title: I Once Became Obsessed With Serial Killers. It Taught Me More About Humans Than Murder.
snippet: There was a period of my life when I couldn't stop reading about serial killers.

title: Chosen Before the Applause.
snippet: Lately, my algorithm has been obsessed with showing me Kylian Mbappé as a child.
